name: tavily_search
description: Search the web for current information on any topic. Use for news, facts, or data beyond your knowledge cutoff. Returns snippets and source URLs.

name: tavily_extract
description: Extract content from URLs. Returns raw page content in markdown or text format. Use when you need full content from web pages.

name: tavily_crawl
description: Crawl a website starting from a URL. Extracts content from pages with configurable depth and breadth. Useful for comprehensive site analysis.

name: browser_navigate
description: Navigate to a URL in the browser. Use for web automation and testing.

name: browser_click
description: Perform click on a web page element. Use for browser interactions.

name: browser_snapshot
description: Capture accessibility snapshot of the current page. Better than screenshot for understanding page structure.

name: browser_type
description: Type text into editable element on a web page. Use for form filling.

name: git_status
description: Shows the working tree status. Use for checking repository state.

name: git_diff
description: Shows differences between branches or commits. Use for code review.

name: git_commit
description: Records changes to the repository. Use for saving work.

name: check_memory
description: Get RAM and swap usage information. Use for system monitoring.

name: check_disk_usage
description: Get disk usage summary. Use for storage management.

name: list_processes
description: List running processes. Use for process management and debugging.
